name: rag
description: 1. Multer handles PDF upload 2. Store PDF in Azure Blob 3. Use LangChain.js PDFLoader to extract text 4. Use LangChain.js TextSplitter to chunk it 5. Use OpenAI/HF Embeddings to vectorize chunks 6. Store in Pinecone (or local MemoryVectorStore) 7. On user query:    - Embed query    - Search for similar chunks    - Feed result into GPT (via LangChain) 8. Return response
